name: Astaxanthin
summary: Decision-ready summary: Astaxanthin is best framed for skin photoaging support; oxidative stress; exercise recovery context; safety screen: pregnancy; hormone-sensitive medication review.
description: Astaxanthin supports skin; oxidative stress; exercise recovery with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally tolerated; keep high-dose and pregnancy guidance conservative.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Astaxanthin has RCT evidence for visual function and digital eye strain outcomes, with recent pediatric and adult data.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Astaxanthin has RCT evidence for visual function and digital eye strain outcomes, with recent pediatric and adult data.

sources.title: PubMed PMID 34376917. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 34376917. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register

contraindications: Concurrent warfarin or other anticoagulant medication due to a documented case report of markedly potentiated anticoagulant effect and INR elevation
concurrent antihypertensive medication due to astaxanthin's own mild blood-pressure-lowering activity
concurrent 5-alpha-reductase inhibitor medication such as finasteride due to a shared effect on testosterone-to-DHT conversion
pregnancy or breastfeeding due to insufficient safety data
known allergy or hypersensitivity to astaxanthin-containing carotenoid supplements.
